name: Binding::ReturnReceived
title: Binding::ReturnReceived
description: Sets the out-parameters for a returning call at a consumed method member that uses the CAPL binding.
The function prototype of the call context must match the function prototype of the method member. Otherwise an error code is returned.

parameters.name: member
parameters.description: Method member which receives a returning call via the CAPL binding.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Call context which contains the out-parameters to be received.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
